A Cinderella Story (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $51,438,175Details
International Box Office $18,674,309
Worldwide Box Office $70,112,484
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,623,350 (26.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:73.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$19,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,625 opening theaters/2,625 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $99,066,115

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 16th, 2004 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 23rd, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: October 19th, 2004 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild language and innuendo.
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: A Cinderella Story
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Romance, Single Parent, Step-Family, Widow/Widower, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Target audience: Tween
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
